description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow set within a fenced rectangular lot, featuring a combination of flat and gabled black roofs. The front facade is defined by a wide driveway, a manicured lawn, and a central walkway leading to the main entrance, flanked by large windows and low shrubbery. The rear of the bungalow opens to a spacious backyard with outdoor seating, a dining area, and a wooden deck, all surrounded by privacy fencing. The building's exterior walls are finished in a light, neutral color, contrasting with the dark roof and fence. Multiple large windows and sliding glass doors provide ample natural light and visual connection between indoor and outdoor spaces. The property includes landscaped garden beds, a garage, and a mix of paved and grassy surfaces.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with black gabled and flat roofs, large windows, and a landscaped yard enclosed by a dark fence. Features include a driveway, garage, outdoor seating, and a wooden deck.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, manicured lawn, and symmetrical landscaping.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, side lawn, and the transition to the backyard with visible outdoor furniture.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, wooden deck, outdoor seating, and large sliding glass doors.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the fenced perimeter, side garden, and the rear portion of the roof structure.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
